auto_trading.comment: Set to false to disable autonomous trading. Mode can be 'demo' or 'live'.

risk_management.comment: Risk per trade as percentage of account balance. Default 2%.

position_limits.comment: Maximum number of trades to prevent overexposure.

lot_size.comment: Lot size constraints for trade execution.

filters.comment: Only execute trades meeting these criteria.

monitoring.comment: How often to check for new setups and monitor active trades.
